name: Tradia Corporation
summary: Tradia Corporation operates as a logistics company. It offers various harbor transport and international transportation services, which cover the process of foreign trade, such as loading and landing of cargo at seaports, customs clearance, transport, storage, and inspection and distribution processing, as well as coordination of routes and expense quotes for international transportation. The company transports goods between Japan, India, China, and other Asian countries, as well as internationally. It also provides export and import services; and international freight forwarding services comprising door-to-door cargo delivery, multimodal transport, and other logistics services, as well as owns and operates warehouses and distribution centers. The company was formerly known as Dainichi Tsuun Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Tradia Corporation in April 1994. Tradia Corporation was founded in 1941 and is headquartered in Kobe, Japan.
